Dev tools

AI-powered assistant

Command Center

Student Command Center

Your AI-powered
academic assistant.

Talk naturally. Capture tasks. Ask about your workload. Built around the way students actually think.

Go to Dashboard →Open Assistant

How It Works

Student Command Center is designed around natural capture, workload clarity, and AI-powered help — without planner complexity.

Step 1

Capture naturally

Type things like "Bio test next Friday" or "Remind me to study chemistry tonight."

Step 2

Structure the mess

The app turns messy inputs into structured tasks with class context, due dates, and reminders.

Step 3

Ask for help

Chat with the assistant about workload, upcoming tests, unfinished work, and what to do next.

Main Areas

The MVP stays focused on assistant usefulness, not planner complexity.

⊞

Dashboard

See your next task, grouped workload, and quick assistant capture in one place.

✦

Assistant

Ask what is due, what to work on tonight, or how to make sense of the week.

✓

Tasks

Capture school work naturally and review the structured task list behind it.

◈

Classes

Set up class context so the assistant understands your academic life better.

⚙

Settings

Manage reminder preferences for daily summaries, tonight check-ins, and due-soon nudges.
